title: KiloEx - Rekt
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation leading to price manipulation and subsequent large fund drain across multiple chains

prevention.rule: Block any tx that directly modifies the price feed contract or any contract that indirectly controls the price feed.

red_flags: Anyone can change Kilo's price oracle
MinimalForwarder contract with no ID validation
summary: KiloEx suffered a $7.5 million loss due to a critical vulnerability in their oracle implementation, allowing attackers to manipulate prices and drain funds across multiple chains. A guard could have prevented this by blocking any transaction that modifies the price feed contract.
